Class Edge

java.lang.Object
evacuation.graph.Edge
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Edge extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an edge (connection) between two nodes in the evacuation graph. An edge has a weight, availability status, block type, agent transit tracking, direction flag, and a speed modifier.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Details

    • Edge

      public Edge(Node source, Node destination, double weight)
      Constructs a bidirectional edge between two nodes with the given weight.
      Parameters:
      source - the source node
      destination - the destination node
      weight - the base weight (cost) of this edge

  • Method Details

    • getWeight

      public double getWeight()
      Returns the effective weight of this edge for pathfinding. If the edge is unavailable, returns positive infinity. If a speed modifier is set, divides the weight by it (faster = lower cost).
      Returns:
      the effective weight, or Double.POSITIVE_INFINITY if unavailable

    • block

      public void block()
      Blocks this edge with the default FIRE blockage type.

    • blockByFire

      public void blockByFire()
      Blocks this edge due to fire.

    • blockByFlood

      public void blockByFlood()
      Blocks this edge due to flooding.

    • unblock

      public void unblock()
      Unblocks this edge, restoring it to full availability.

    • addAgent

      public void addAgent()
      Adds an agent to the in-transit count.

    • removeAgent

      public void removeAgent()
      Removes an agent from the in-transit count.

    • recordTransit

      public void recordTransit()
      Records that an agent has fully transited this edge. Increments the agentsPassed counter.

    • resetStats

      public void resetStats()
      Resets the agentsPassed counter to zero.

    • getSource

      public Node getSource()
      Returns:
      the source node

    • getDestination

      public Node getDestination()
      Returns:
      the destination node

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Returns:
      true if this edge is currently available

    • getBaseWeight

      public double getBaseWeight()
      Returns:
      the base weight (before speed modifier)

    • getBlockType

      public Edge.BlockType getBlockType()
      Returns:
      the block type

    • getAgentsInTransit

      public int getAgentsInTransit()
      Returns:
      the number of agents currently in transit on this edge

    • getCapacity

      public int getCapacity()
      Returns:
      the maximum agent capacity of this edge

    • setCapacity

      public void setCapacity(int c)
      Parameters:
      c - new capacity (minimum 1)

    • isDirected

      public boolean isDirected()
      Returns:
      true if this edge is directed (one-way)

    • setDirected

      public void setDirected(boolean directed)
      Parameters:
      directed - true to make this edge one-way (source→destination)

    • getSpeedModifier

      public double getSpeedModifier()
      Returns:
      the speed modifier (1.0=normal, >1.0=faster, <1.0=slower)

    • setSpeedModifier

      public void setSpeedModifier(double speedModifier)
      Parameters:
      speedModifier - the new speed modifier (must be > 0)

    • getAgentsPassed

      public int getAgentsPassed()
      Returns:
      total agents that have transited this edge

    • getPoids

      @Deprecated public double getPoids()
      Deprecated.
      Use getWeight()

    • isDisponible

      @Deprecated public boolean isDisponible()
      Deprecated.
      Use isAvailable()

      @Deprecated public double getPoidsBase()
      Deprecated.
      Use getBaseWeight()
